title: Problem with using stale auto-indexes created on materialized sub-selects within trigger programs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age UInt32, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE orders (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Float64, order_date DateTime DEFAULT now());
ALTER TABLE orders ADD COLUMN updated_at DateTime DEFAULT now();
key_bug_features: Using stale auto-indexes in trigger programs
